candidates.role: first supervised fixed-ontology arm with an overlap-capable W2NER head
candidates.evidence: A directly relevant study on retyped Shen Bao articles from 1872-1947 reports F1 58.26 for MacBERT versus 56.83 for SIKU. It is target-period evidence but not an OCR-robustness result.

candidates.role: proposed target-domain continued-pretraining challenger with the identical W2NER head
candidates.evidence: No released project checkpoint or score exists. The closest Shen Bao study found MacBERT strongest among its tested encoders and identifies historical-press domain pretraining as future work; this arm tests that hypothesis using training issues only.

candidates.role: new massively multilingual supervised encoder challenger with the identical W2NER head
candidates.evidence: The official model and paper cover 1,800+ languages including Chinese, but mmBERT only ties XLM-R on WikiANN NER and its authors identify prefix-tokenization weakness for NER/POS. There is no historical, Traditional-Chinese, or OCR result, so this is a controlled challenger rather than a replacement for MacBERT.

candidates.role: custom-tokenizer-gated Chinese-specific long-context encoder challenger with the identical W2NER head
candidates.evidence: The official paper and card describe a 377M-parameter encoder trained on about 1.2T modern-Chinese tokens with an 8,192-token context, but publish no NER, Traditional-Chinese, historical, or OCR result and show mixed CLUE results versus RoBERTa-WWM-large. Its custom tokenizer defaults to destructive text preprocessing, including fullwidth conversion, URL/email/HTML replacement or removal, whitespace/control changes, and stripping. It may enter the tournament only with preprocessing disabled, audited pinned custom code, and a passing raw-source offset qualification.

candidates.role: license-gated secondary ancient-text mismatch control with an identical W2NER head
candidates.evidence: The project corpus is late-Qing/Republican-era Traditional Chinese, not ancient Chinese, so Guji pretraining is a domain mismatch rather than a presumed advantage. An EvaHan model-selection comparison with one SikuBERT encoder reports W2NER average F1 88.48 versus GlobalPointer 87.33 and CRF 86.33, but the authors explicitly warn that augmented samples may leak across those random folds. GujiRoBERTa-W2NER reached 86.34 on the public test, where the baseline also used a different encoder. This is weak clean-ancient-text evidence, not a project head winner, and the checkpoint card declares no license.

candidates.role: target-period-evaluated encoder control despite ancient-book pretraining, with an identical W2NER head
candidates.evidence: Pretrained on Siku Quanshu, which is not the project's late-Qing/Republican newspaper language. Retain it only because the directly relevant retyped Shen Bao comparison reports F1 56.83, below MacBERT's 58.26; neither result measures OCR transfer.

candidates.role: license-gated research-only open-type challenger excluded from the executable tournament
candidates.evidence: The 2026 preprint reports broad multilingual coverage and average gains over GLiNER-X-base, but no Chinese-specific, historical, Traditional-Chinese, OCR, or nested-entity result; the checkpoint card has no license metadata.

Official model card reports zh_pud F1 0.6794; no historical, Traditional-Chinese, or OCR benchmark. A local first-50-region compatibility run required a fixed zh-hant Stanza splitter and produced 67 noisy candidates versus 5 from multi-v2.1, with only 2 exact span/type agreements; this does not establish accuracy.
Multimodal schema extraction with verbatim strings; no disclosed late-Qing/Republican-era Traditional-Chinese NER result.

candidates.role: low-cost Chinese-capable generative exact-span NER challenger served through a local OpenAI-compatible endpoint
candidates.evidence: The official card describes an 873,438,784-parameter multilingual vision-language causal model with Chinese evaluation and a 262,144-token native context, but publishes no NER, late-Qing/Republican-era Traditional-Chinese, OCR-noise, or exact-offset result. Its modern Chinese competence makes it a worthwhile measured challenger for this non-ancient corpus, not an assumed winner. Benchmark output must be schema-constrained and rejected unless every returned surface and offset is verbatim evidence.
Chinese-capable 27B vision-language ceiling with stronger generic/document results than the earlier family; no historical NER evidence and roughly 55.6 GB BF16 weights.
Produced noisy candidate spans on one lossy Shen Bao page and has not passed review.

annotation_acceleration_controls.role: Chinese open-schema suggestion control shown only after independent annotation
annotation_acceleration_controls.evidence: Official PaddleNLP documentation reports Chinese/English NER, relation and event extraction and 0.773 zero-shot F1 on modern clean CCIR2021 news NER. Its example output contains strings rather than authoritative offsets, and the public model path did not expose a reproducible immutable revision through the Hugging Face API. Accept only uniquely recoverable verbatim spans; never union suggestions into gold or production candidates automatically.

excluded_from_primary_benchmark.reason: Published language list does not include Chinese.

Apache-2.0 and multilingual, but its card publishes no Chinese, historical, or OCR evaluation. It returns contiguous offsets and can allow nested overlaps, but not discontinuous mentions; Chinese also requires a fixed tokenizer rather than unsafe whitespace splitting. Keep only as a low-priority control because GLiNER-X already has a modern-Chinese result and a measured local compatibility run.

Retain only as a lower-cost control when 80 GB-class hardware is unavailable; NuExtract3's own generic structured-extraction comparison favors NuExtract3, and neither has target late-Qing/Republican-era Traditional-Chinese NER evidence.

The paper reports gains over W2NER on discontinuous English biomedical NER, but the repository declares no license and supplies no Chinese, historical, or OCR evidence. Reconsider a clean-room or explicitly licensed implementation only if adjudicated project gold shows a material discontinuous-entity slice.
